content: Phase 1 POC: Supabase Realtime 2-client sync + upsert + persistence validated in isolation
Phase 2: Convert frontend to Next.js + TS + Tailwind & data.js -> typed data.ts verbatim
Phase 2: Build lib (utils, useStatuses hook) + shared components
Phase 2: Build 7 tabs (Today, Schedule, Deliverables w/ live status, Interviews, Delegates, Titleholders, Contacts+Map)
Phase 2: Wire CrewApp shell + page.tsx; all 7 tabs render, no console errors, realtime connected
Phase 3: README (Supabase SQL + env vars) + .env.example + hide dev indicator
Phase 2/3: E2E testing via testing_agent — 100% pass (realtime sync, filters/sort, nav, mobile menu, data integrity)
Phase 3: Self-verified shot-time ordering + reset Supabase table to clean slate
